hero.title:
Running tabs,
without the spreadsheet
hero.subtitle: Are you running events where guests have running tabs? Have an establishment with regulars? Tired of managing everyone's balance in a spreadsheet? Then Bartab is the app for you.
stats.title: Processed by Bartab in the last 30 days
feature.menu.title: Menu & inventory
feature.menu.desc: Set up your menu with items and prices, and track inventory with low-stock alerts.
feature.balances.title: Update balances
feature.balances.desc: Update a guest's balance with each purchase—individually or for multiple guests at once.
feature.guests.title: Manage guests
feature.guests.desc: Manage your list of guests, with manual adjustments for special expenses or paying off tabs.
feature.emails.title: Emails & receipts
feature.emails.desc: Send balance notification emails to guests, and generate professional receipts and invoices in PDF format.
feature.tax.title: Sales tax
feature.tax.desc: Configure sales tax—set whether your prices are tax-inclusive or exclusive, with tax breakdowns on all documents.
feature.stats.title: Sales statistics
feature.stats.desc: Track sales statistics by date, weekday, and item.
feature.offline.title: iPhone, iPad & offline
feature.offline.desc: Works seamlessly across iPhone and iPad, synced in real time across all your devices—and keeps working even with a poor connection or completely offline.
feature.future.title: Shape the future
feature.future.desc: Vote on features, help localize the app, and chat directly with the developer through the in-app chat.
cta.title: Ready to ditch the spreadsheet?
cta.subtitle: Try Bartab free for one week. No commitment.
app.title: Download Bartab
app.subtitle: Running tab and POS in one app—food, drinks, balance, open tabs. Free to try for one week.
history.title: Transaction history
history.subtitle: Your purchases and balance changes
history.empty_subtitle: Your transaction history will appear here.
history.demo_text: You're viewing sample transaction history. Use a link from the app to see your real data.
history.error_no_token: No token provided. Please use a valid link to view your transaction history.
history.error_not_found: Transaction history not found. The link may have expired or be invalid.
history.error_connection: Unable to connect to the server. Please check your internet connection and try again.
email_confirm.success_text: Your email has been verified. You can now sign in to your Bartab account.
email_confirm.error_text: This confirmation link has expired. Please request a new confirmation email from the app.
reset.title: Reset your password
reset.error_message: This link is invalid or has expired. Please request a new password reset email.
reset.error_failed: Failed to update password. Please try again.
password_success.title: Password updated
password_success.text: Your password has been changed. You can now sign in with your new password.

auth_callback.no_code_text: This page was opened without a sign-in code. Please try signing in again from the app.
